use_cases: Displaying a gallery of photos in a casual, nostalgic polaroid style layout
Creating an engaging product showcase with animated image reordering
Building a creative portfolio component with interactive image shuffling
Adding a playful photo-sharing feature to social or lifestyle applications
ai_summary: A polaroid-style image stack component that displays multiple images scattered with randomized positions, rotations, and scales. Features a reshuffle animation that smoothly transitions images to new random positions using Framer Motion. The component supports customizable scatter radius, rotation range, and seeded randomness for consistent layouts across renders. Ideal for creative showcases, photo galleries, and interactive media displays.
